span.p:
اِذْهَبْنَ
قُلْنَ
اِفْتَحْنَ
اُكْتُبْنَ
ضَعْنَ
جِدْنَ
اِسْأَلْنَ

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

اِذْهَبَا
قولا
اِفْتَحَا
اُكْتُبَا
ضَعَا
جِدَا
اِسْأَلا

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
(go) اِذْهَبْ
(say or tell) قُلْ
(open) اِفْتَحْ
(write) اُكْتُبْ
(put/place) ضَعْ
(found) جِدْ
اِسْأَلْ/سَلْ
